title: Softly - Digital Wellness App
description: A soft-aesthetic, Gen-Z oriented design system optimized for wellness, meditation, journaling, and lifestyle brands. Features a warm off-white foundation (#FDFCF8) layered with soft pastel accents (Coral #FFB7B2, Sage #E8EFE8, Lavender #EFEDF4), grain-textured overlays, and a mix of modern geometric sans-serif ('Outfit') and organic handwriting ('Reenie Beanie') typography. The layout emphasizes breathing room, gentle scroll-triggered reveals, and 'floating' organic shapes to reduce cognitive load and evoke a sense of calm.
